title: Netroddharakaswami Temple
tagline: Netroddharakaswami Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Netroddharakaswami Temple (நேத்ரோதாரகாஸ்வாமி கோயில்) is a Hindu temple located at Panaiyapuram in the Viluppuram district of Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Netroddharakaswami Temple (நேத்ரோதாரகாஸ்வாமி கோயில்) is a Hindu temple located at Panaiyapuram in the Viluppuram district of Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity is Shiva and the main idol is a Shiva Linga. It is classified as a Paadal Petra Sthalam.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Vikravandi
topPlaces.description: Vikravandi is a developing town and suburb of city of Villupuram in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Thennamadevi
topPlaces.description: Thennamadevi or thennaven ma devi is a village in Tamil Nadu, India, not far from Viluppuram. In 2016, a group of teenaged women "took over" the village and enacted several civic improvements within two years.

topPlaces.name: Pombur
topPlaces.description: Pombur is an Indian village near Vikravandi. It is located between three towns Villupuram, Pondicherry and Tindivanam.

topPlaces.name: Viluppuram taluk
topPlaces.description: Viluppuram Taluk is a taluk of Viluppuram district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The headquarters of the taluk is the town of Viluppuram.

topPlaces.name: Viluppuram division
topPlaces.description: Viluppuram division is a revenue division in the Viluppuram district of Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Abirameswarar Temple
topPlaces.description: Abirameswarar Temple (also called Thiruvamathur Temple) is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located in Thiruvamaathur, a village in Viluppuram district in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Shiva is worshiped as Abirameswarar, and is represented by the lingam.

topPlaces.name: Nangathur
topPlaces.description: Nangathur is a village located in between Villupuram and Ginge. It is 23 km away from Villupuram and 15 km away from Ginge.

topPlaces.name: Viluppuram
topPlaces.description: Viluppuram, Villupuram, or Vizhuppuram (Tamil: [ʋiɻɯppɯɾam] ) is a city and the administrative headquarters of Viluppuram district of Tamil Nadu. Located 61 kilometres (38 mi) south west of a Tiruvannamalai and 35 kilometres (22 mi) north west of Cuddalore null The town serves as a major and largest railway junction, and National Highway 45 passes through it.

items.note: Vikravandi is a developing town and suburb of city of Villupuram in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

Thennamadevi or thennaven ma devi is a village in Tamil Nadu, India, not far from Viluppuram. In 2016, a group of teenaged women "took over" the village and enacted several civic improvements within two years.
Pombur is an Indian village near Vikravandi. It is located between three towns Villupuram, Pondicherry and Tindivanam.
Viluppuram Taluk is a taluk of Viluppuram district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The headquarters of the taluk is the town of Viluppuram.
Viluppuram division is a revenue division in the Viluppuram district of Tamil Nadu, India.

Abirameswarar Temple (also called Thiruvamathur Temple) is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located in Thiruvamaathur, a village in Viluppuram district in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Shiva is worshiped as Abirameswarar, and is represented by the lingam.
Nangathur is a village located in between Villupuram and Ginge. It is 23 km away from Villupuram and 15 km away from Ginge.

Viluppuram, Villupuram, or Vizhuppuram (Tamil: [ʋiɻɯppɯɾam] ) is a city and the administrative headquarters of Viluppuram district of Tamil Nadu. Located 61 kilometres (38 mi) south west of a Tiruvannamalai and 35 kilometres (22 mi) north west of Cuddalore null The town serves as a major and largest railway junction, and National Highway 45 passes through it.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Netroddharakaswami Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Netroddharakaswami Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Netroddharakaswami Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chennai International Airport (129 km) and the nearest railway station is Chennai Central (144 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Netroddharakaswami Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Netroddharakaswami Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Netroddharakaswami Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Netroddharakaswami Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Netroddharakaswami Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Vikravandi, Thennamadevi, Pombur, Viluppuram taluk, Viluppuram division.
